description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a complex, multi-faceted roof structure composed of dark, textured panels. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored masonry, contrasted by dark wooden accents around the windows and balcony. Large, angular windows provide ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic, with a prominent balcony extending from the upper floor. The house includes a stepped concrete entryway and a covered porch area, enhancing its urban curb appeal. The roofline is dynamic, with intersecting gable and hip elements, and a single chimney is visible. The overall structure is spacious, likely accommodating multiple rooms and living areas across two stories.
description: A modern, two-story house with a complex dark roof, light masonry walls, large windows, and a prominent balcony. Features include a stepped entryway, covered porch, and wooden accents.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main entryway, large windows, balcony, and intersecting rooflines.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stepped entryway, side door, and the full length of the main roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying symmetrical windows, a smaller window, and the back roof slope.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the complex roof structure and the balcony protruding from one side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and grouped smaller windows
attribute_entryway_design: Stepped concrete entryway with a covered porch, modern door, and minimal decorative elements
